issues.message: Rooted href does not resolve within build output
Rooted href does not resolve within build output

observations: The meta banner is present and visible at the top, correctly framing the site as a RootSpec demo before any other content.
Typography is editorial in character — serif body copy, restrained palette, light mode default — consistent with the SEED's aesthetic direction.

The hero tagline uses italic emphasis on 'proof' which lands well, but the hero text appears very large and the scroll-through screenshots reveal it repeating across viewport states, suggesting the section may animate or transition through states in a way that could feel sluggish on first load.

The four skill badges (/rs-init, /rs-spec, /rs-impl, /rs-validate) are rendered in a monospace pill style and are visible beneath the hero CTA, which matches the spec's requirement for prominent skill labeling.

Section transitions visible in the scrolling screenshots show consistent layout and spacing, with 'THE PROBLEM' and 'THE HIERARCHY' sections clearly delineated — no obviously broken layout regions detected.
